errors.notValidGeneric: This payment-request link is not valid.
errors.noRequest: No payment request found. The link should look like .../pay#…
errors.invalidRecipient: This payment-request link has an invalid recipient address.

confirm.selfPay: This request is for your own address — you'd be paying yourself.
confirm.knownNamed: You've paid {{name}} before — they're in your contacts.
confirm.knownUnnamed: You've paid this address before — it's in your contacts.
confirm.unknownStrong: You have not paid this address before.
confirm.unknown: Double-check the full address above — payment-request links are attacker-controllable and payments can't be reversed.
confirm.noAmountSpecified: The requester didn't specify an amount — enter how much to send.
confirm.largePrefillPrefix: This link is requesting a large amount (
confirm.largePrefillSuffix: ). I've verified the amount and recipient and want to send it.

success.savePrompt: Save this address as a contact?

gate.unlockPrompt: Unlock your wallet to pay this request.
gate.needWalletPrompt: You need a wallet to pay this request.
gate.confirmedPhrase: I've written down my recovery phrase and stored it safely.
gate.setPasswordPrompt: Set a password — your wallet is encrypted on this device with it.
gate.overwriteStrong: This device already has a wallet{{suffix}}.
gate.overwriteWarning: Continuing replaces it and deletes its stored seed — any funds in it are lost unless you have its recovery phrase backed up.
gate.seedPlaceholder: Enter your 12 or 24 word recovery phrase…
